content: GANDHI INSTITUTE OF ENGINEERING AND TECHNOLOGY UNIVERSITY , ODISHA, GUNUPUR (GIET UNIVERSITY) DIST- RAYAGADA (ODISHA), PIN-765022 [Established vide Odisha Act-23 of 2018, Included by UGC and Approved AICTE, New Delhi] OFFICE OF THE CONTROLLER OF EXAMINATIONS Ref. No. GIETU/Exam/2025/ | S545 Date: - 05/11/2025 NOTICE In partial modification of the B.Tech (Batch 2022-2026) Seventh Semester Regular Examination schedule notified vide Notification No. GIETU/Exam/1465 dated 13.10.2025, it is hereby informed that the examination originally scheduled for CSE,CSE-AIML,CSE-DS,EE,EEE,ECE on 08.11.2025 from 02:30 PM to 05:30 PM has been rescheduled to 10.11.2025 from 09:00 AM to 12:00 AM due to TCS Placement Drive and for the other branches the examination will be held as per the schedule. W ’b/ { » Controller of Examinations GIET University Memo No: | 3% Date: 05.11.2025 Copy to: Vice- Chancellor/ Registrar/Dean SoET for information. All HoDs/ 4" year Coordinator for information and necessary action. They are requested to inform the students. Corhemmaﬁo s GIETU Website/Notice Board. GIET University
